summary: Add the pagan/folkloric batch — 5 new traditions, 7 sources (Aradia, Eddas, Kojiki, Yoruba, Kalevala, Mabinogion)
description:
## Scope

Add 7 sources across 5 new traditions in one batch. All URLs verified clean on 2026-05-31; no GUESS markers, no slug or id collisions. Fully independent of the Upanishads ticket — can run in parallel.

## Sources

| id | url | format | tradition |
|---|---|---|---|
| aradia-gospel-witches | sacred-texts.com/pag/aradia/index.htm | html_multi | pagan_witchcraft |
| poetic-edda-voluspo | sacred-texts.com/neu/poe/poe03.htm | html | norse |
| poetic-edda-hovamol | sacred-texts.com/neu/poe/poe04.htm | html | norse |
| kojiki-beginning-heaven-earth | sacred-texts.com/shi/kj/kj008.htm | html | shinto |
| yoruba-speaking-peoples-ellis | sacred-texts.com/afr/yor/index.htm | html_multi | yoruba |
| kalevala | gutenberg.org/cache/epub/5186/pg5186.html | html | finnic |
| mabinogion | gutenberg.org/files/5160/5160-h/5160-h.htm | html | celtic |

Each entry needs a `chunking/{trad}/{id}.toml`.

## Per-source caveats (documented inline in pagan.md)

- **Aradia**: exclude ara00–ara02 (title/preface/contents). Italian incantations interleaved with English translation — keep both, do not strip the Italian.
- **Yoruba (Ellis)**: chapter numbering quirk noted at fetch time (see pagan.md). Colonial ethnography — tag as such, not insider account.
- **Kojiki**: scope is Section I only (Beginning of Heaven and Earth). Drop Chamberlain's inline footnote ordinals; preserve sentence flow. Trailing Footnotes block needs strip.
- **Eddas (Bellows)**: stanza-numbered commentary in `[brackets]` should be treated as text-critical metadata — mirror Enoch `[[ ]]` handling.
- **Kalevala (Gutenberg #5186)**: strip Gutenberg header/license boilerplate and the back-matter (glossary, pronunciation notes) before chunking. Structure: PROEM + RUNE I–L; regex-section-split on `^RUNE ([IVXLC]+)\.`.
- **Mabinogion (Gutenberg #5160)**: 13 titled tales, not numbered. Title-heading regex split. Guest's extensive footnotes are scholarly apparatus — treat as metadata.

## Pipeline

acquire → chunk → embed_corpus → re-tag → re-edges. Five new tradition directories will be created under `corpus/` and `chunking/`.

## Files

- `docs/corpus-expansion/pagan.md` — draft manifest (all 7 URLs verified 2026-05-31)
- `docs/corpus-expansion/url-vetting.md` — verification record
- `sources/manifest.toml` — append target
